# Knox Pulse
> Knoxville, TN's curated event discovery platform — recurring events, live music, trivia, outdoor activities, markets, festivals, and more at theknoxpulse.com

## What is Knox Pulse?
Knox Pulse is a free, single-page web app that helps locals and visitors discover the best recurring events and activities in Knoxville, Tennessee. It covers 99+ vetted listings across 15 categories, filterable by neighborhood, day of week, cost, indoor/outdoor preference, age restrictions, and season.

## Categories
Live Music · Trivia & Games · Karaoke · Dancing · Outdoor & Nature · Sports & Recreation · Arts & Museums · Festivals & Events · Film & Cinema · Markets · Community & Civic · Comedy · Theater & Performance · Tours & Experiences · Fitness & Wellness

## Neighborhoods Covered
Downtown · Old City · South Knoxville · North Knoxville · Fort Sanders · West Knoxville · East Knoxville · Bearden · Fountain City · North Shore

## Notable Events
- UT Vols Football at Neyland Stadium (Fall Saturdays)
- UT Vols & Lady Vols Basketball (Winter)
- Knoxville Smokies Baseball at Covenant Health Park
- Blue Plate Special — free live music at WDVX (weekdays)
- Market Square Farmers Market (Wednesdays & Saturdays)
- First Friday Art Walk (Market Square & Old City)
- Big Ears Festival (March, multiple downtown venues)
- Dogwood Arts Festival (April, World's Fair Park)
- Tennessee Valley Fair (September)
- Knox Pride Fest (World's Fair Park)
- Knoxville Marathon (March)
- Sunday Bluegrass Jam at Suttree Landing Park
- Full Moon Drum Circle at Sequoyah Hills Park
- Sunsphere & World's Fair Park (free observation deck)
- Ijams Nature Center & Urban Wilderness trails
- Clingmans Dome Sunrise Hike (Great Smoky Mountains)
- Silent Disco, Drag Brunch, Swing Dance, Secret Cinema, and 80+ more

## Site Structure
- `/` — Full event grid with search and filter panel
- `/?event=<id>` — Individual event detail page (schedule, map, contact, photos, reviews)

## Event Data Fields
Each event includes: title, category, neighborhood, full address, indoor/outdoor, schedule (day/time/frequency), cost/price range, age restrictions, venue name, phone, website, email, Instagram handle, and featured photo.

## Data Sources
Curated static listings maintained by the Knox Pulse team, plus community-submitted events stored in Firebase Firestore. Community members can submit events, leave reviews, and upload photos.

## Technical
Static SPA hosted on Cloudflare Pages. Sitemap: https://www.theknoxpulse.com/sitemap.xml
